name: idea-check
description: Continuously verify that plain-language product ideas remain true.

interface.shortDescription: Verify that product ideas remain true.
interface.longDescription: Idea Check turns plain-language product ideas into fresh, evidence-backed verification runs in CI, releases, and scheduled audits.
defaultPrompt: Verify the ideas in this project.
Run the CI idea verification profile.
Try to falsify our release-blocking ideas.
